name: Chocolate-Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler; cook until melted.
2. Remove from heat; stir in remaining ingredients. Stir until smooth.
3. Spread over cheesecake while glaze is warm. Yield: enough for one 9-inch cheesecake.
These recipes are from the 86 Annual Recipes of Southern Living. Recipe creator was Mrs. Randy Bryant from Franklin, VA.
